game.path: ./The Legend of Zelda - Wand of Gamelon Remastered.sh
game.name: The Legend of Zelda : Wand of Gamelon Remastered
game.desc: Zelda: Wand of Gamelon and Link: Faces of Evil have been remastered using the original assets, and includes widescreen, cutscene subtitles, unlockables, and a Remastered Mode for less frustrating gameplay. The cutscenes are still the same old memey goodness you know and love!
